title: Navaris Diamond Knife Sharpener Steel - Japanese Chefs Knife Sharpener with Ergonomic Handle - Honing Rod for Chef's Knives Carving Knives and More - Diamond Sharpening Rod
features: Sharpening Rod: The Navaris diamond sharpener rod allows you to sharpen a variety of carving knife and more, so you're always ready for the next culinary challenge.
Durable & Ergonomic: The professional oval honing steel features a special diamond coating to hone and sharpen knives. Its firm, non-slip ergonomic handle ensures a safe grip and comfortable feel.
Great Gift Idea: The knife steel is the perfect gift idea for a chef or passionate kitchen enthusiast. The oval shaped diamond steel is stylishly designed to ensure higher sharpening efficiency.
Easy to Use: Slide one side of the pro honing rod from end to tip at a 20 degree angle along the rod surface. Repeat 2-3 times. Turn the knife sharpener rod over and repeat on the other side.

Suitable Knives: The Navaris kitchen knife sharpener is suitable for a variety of knives, including large or small kitchen knives, and ceramic knives. You can be confident that you'll never have to slice, dice and chop with a dull blade again.
description: Product Description Take care of your knives for a long and productive life in the kitchen. This knife steel features a special diamond coating, which means you can use it on a range of kitchen knives, including ceramic. FOR A VARIETY OF KNIVES The steel rod is designed to accommodate a variety of blades. Try it out on multi-purpose kitchen knives, ceramic knives, small blades or large blades. ULTRA-SHARP Sharpen all sorts of knives using the honing rod. Not having to struggle with dull blades makes your work in the kitchen cleaner, safer, and more pleasant. KNIFE SIZE The sharpening steel is 12" long (31cm) and can be used for both larger and smaller knives. HOW TO USE Slide one side of the blade from end to tip at a 20 degree angle along the rod surface. Repeat 2-3 times. Turn the blade over and repeat on the other side. DURABLE MATERIALS The knife is constructed of sturdy materials, and is designed to last you for many years of service. SPECIFICATIONS Rod length: 12" (31 cm) Materials: Diamond coated steel, plastic grip, plastic cap SCOPE OF DELIVERY 1x Diamond Sharpening Steel About Navaris Selected Designs The Navaris range incorporates an array of styles to provide a catalogue of products that offers functional designs, timeless classics and contemporary furnishings. Useful Navaris products are inspired by everyday living. As a brand, we stand to provide straightforward and simple solutions to everyday situations to help make life that little bit easier. German Based From our hub in Berlin, we use a global network of experts to deliver quality products directly to you. Everything in the Navaris range is specifically tried, tested and developed to meet our rigorous standards.
